positive: A mystical, symmetrical arrangement of intertwined forest elements and celestial bodies. The central focus is a stylized constellation forming a glowing woodland creature (like a fox or stag). Incorporate detailed, flowing silhouettes of ferns, moon phases, cypress branches, and geometric stellar dust patterns. Use a highly contrasted, minimalist ink style reminiscent of fine line etching and sacred geometry. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, forest green, and ethereal gold accents, emphasizing negative space for clean apparel printing. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for a repeating or single-chest print, rendered with strong, crisp linework and deep shadow contrast.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry lines, low contrast, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, disfigured, jpeg artifacts, messy composition
